channel.title: UNH — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on UNH (UnitedHealth) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Andreas Halvorsen: NEW POSITION UNH (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Andreas Halvorsen (Viking Global Investors) new position UNH in Q4 2025 · 1.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Andreas Halvorsen)

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED UNH (+30%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added UNH in Q4 2025 · 3.1% of portfolio. Adding aggressively on UnitedHealth's pullback.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED UNH (-19%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed UNH in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Polen Capital)
